hooks.command: file_path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|json|md)$'; then npx prettier --write "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

file_path=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty'); if [ -n "$file_path" ] && echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then npx eslint --fix "$file_path" 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if git diff --cached --name-only | grep -qE '(auth|api|action|middleware|webhook)'; then echo '⚠️  SECURITY-SENSITIVE FILES IN COMMIT - verify: auth checks, input validation, no secrets'; fi
echo '🔒 Running security audit...' && (bun audit 2>/dev/null || npm audit --audit-level=high 2>/dev/null || echo 'Audit not available')

if git diff --cached | grep -qiE '(api[_-]?key|secret[_-]?key|password|token|credential)\s*[=:]\s*["'\'][^"'\' ]{8,}'; then echo '❌ BLOCKED: Potential secret detected in commit. Remove hardcoded credentials.' && exit 1; fi || true
echo '❌ BLOCKED: Cannot push to prod branch. Production deploys are human-only.' && exit 1
echo '❌ BLOCKED: Cannot merge to or checkout prod branch. Production is human-only.' && exit 1

hooks.prompt: ⚠️ DESTRUCTIVE OPERATION DETECTED. Confirm this is intentional and necessary. If deleting project files, ensure they are backed up or in git.
⚠️ DESTRUCTIVE DATABASE OPERATION. This will delete data. Confirm this is intentional and you have a backup or this is a development database.

hooks.command: echo 'Permission requested - check Claude Code session'

customInstructions: You are building a CAIO incubator project. Follow the conventions in CLAUDE.md. Work through tickets in specs/TICKETS.md continuously. Use TDD. Never merge to prod. Surface decisions via /decision command. Commit after each completed ticket.
